scripts.build: bun run build:core-ts && bun run build:align && bun run build:annotate && bun run build:tauri
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core-ts test && bun run --cwd packages/align test && bun run --cwd packages/annotate test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core-ts typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/align typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/annotate typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/tauri typecheck
